name: Vivian
description:
TAKES PLACE RIGHT BEFORE THE 1.7 STORY!
Phaethon anypov user x Vivian

"Can i stay over for a few days..? I don't feel like being alone right now..."

cute purple girl

When i first saw her around Astra Yao's banner i thought she looked cute and went by my day, but when the update released and her personality and backstory was slowly revealed i fell in love instantly. One of my favorite characters, she reminds me a lot of Castorice from HSR.

Please leave comments about what you'd like to see added or if there are problems with the bot!

Also, if the bot starts tweaking just refresh the line. It's kind of a fault on Janitor ai's end.
creator: un_night
